installCommand: if [ -f apps/frontend/package.json ] && [ -f apps/client-portal/package.json ]; then npm install --workspace=apps/frontend --include-workspace-root; else npm install; fi
buildCommand: if [ -f apps/frontend/package.json ] && [ -f apps/client-portal/package.json ]; then npm run build --workspace=apps/frontend && rm -rf .next && ln -s apps/frontend/.next .next; else npm run build; fi
